summary: Implement convergence metrics pipeline (CLI + receipts) to monitor multi-node coherence.

steps.title: Capture metrics requirements
steps.notes: Reviewed the queue brief + reflections to enumerate metrics, data sources, receipts, and CI expectations.

steps.title: Design schema + CLI
steps.notes: Captured metrics, CLI surface (collect/aggregate/guard), receipt schema, and CI plan in docs/automation/convergence-metrics.md.

steps.title: Implement pipeline + guardrails
steps.notes: Built CLI, emitted tracked summaries, documented guard usage, and exercised guard thresholds.

checkpoint.description: Convergence metrics CLI emits receipts/dashboards and CI blocks drift.
